EnterpriseSDK
Table of Contents

Interface IEnumVertex

Namespace
ESRI.ArcGIS.Geometry
Assembly
ESRI.Server.Geometry.dll

Provides access to members that iterate over the vertices or points of a geometry (see the EnumVertices property of the IPointCollection interface).

[InterfaceType(ComInterfaceType.InterfaceIsIUnknown)]
[Guid("4CF93638-EB81-11D2-9F2D-00C04F6BC8E8")]
public interface IEnumVertex

Methods

Clone()

Returns a copy of this enumerator positioned at the same vertex.

IEnumVertex Clone()

Returns

IEnumVertex

Examples

Sample Snippet

IsLastInPart()

Indicates if the current vertex is last in the current part.

bool IsLastInPart()

Returns

bool

Examples

Sample Snippet

Next(out IPoint, out int, out int)

Returns the next vertex and its location within the geometry.

void Next(out IPoint outVertex, out int outPartIndex, out int vertexIndex)

Parameters

outVertex IPoint
outPartIndex int
vertexIndex int

Examples

Sample Snippet

NextInPart(out IPoint, out int)

Returns the next vertex in current part, or goes back to the first vertex in the part after last vertex in part is encountered.

void NextInPart(out IPoint outVertex, out int OutVertexIndex)

Parameters

outVertex IPoint
OutVertexIndex int

Examples

Sample Snippet

Previous(out IPoint, out int, out int)

Returns the previous vertex and its location in the geometry.

void Previous(out IPoint outVertex, out int outPartIndex, out int vertexIndex)

Parameters

outVertex IPoint
outPartIndex int
vertexIndex int

Examples

Sample Snippet

QueryNext(IPoint, out int, out int) 

void QueryNext(IPoint vertex, out int outPartIndex, out int vertexIndex)

Parameters

vertex IPoint
outPartIndex int
vertexIndex int

QueryNextInPart(IPoint, out int) 

void QueryNextInPart(IPoint vertex, out int OutVertexIndex)

Parameters

vertex IPoint
OutVertexIndex int

QueryPrevious(IPoint, out int, out int) 

void QueryPrevious(IPoint vertex, out int outPartIndex, out int vertexIndex)

Parameters

vertex IPoint
outPartIndex int
vertexIndex int

Reset()

Starts from the beginning of the geometry the next time Next is called.

void Reset()

Examples

Sample Snippet

ResetToEnd()

Starts from the end of the geometry the next time Previous is called.

void ResetToEnd()

Examples

Sample Snippet

SetAt(int, int)

Resets enumerator to specific location.

void SetAt(int iPart, int iVertex)

Parameters

iPart int
iVertex int

Examples

Sample Snippet

Skip(int)

Skips forward or backward over a specified number of vertices.

void Skip(int numVertices)

Parameters

numVertices int

Examples

Sample Snippet

put_Attribute(esriGeometryAttributes, double)

Sets attribute values at the current vertex.

void put_Attribute(esriGeometryAttributes attributeType, double Value)

Parameters

attributeType esriGeometryAttributes
Value double

Examples

Sample Snippet

put_ID(int)

Sets the ID attribute of the current vertex. For segment-based geometries, this will modify a pair of segments.

void put_ID(int pointID)

Parameters

pointID int

Examples

Sample Snippet

put_M(double)

Sets the M attribute of the current vertex. For segment-based geometries, this will modify a pair of segments.

void put_M(double M)

Parameters

M double

Examples

Sample Snippet

put_X(double)

Sets the X coordinate of the current vertex. For segment-based geometries, this will modify a pair of segments.

void put_X(double X)

Parameters

X double

Sample Snippet

put_Y(double)

Sets the Y coordinate of the current vertex. For segment-based geometries, this will modify a pair of segments.

Y double

put_Z(double)

Sets the Z coordinate of the current vertex. For segment-based geometries, this will modify a pair of segments.
